---
---

## Slide 1 - OJS cell output

::: {.absolute left=40px top=493px width=1050px height=77px}
```{ojs}
md`**hello** from observable`
```
:::

## Slide 2 - Multiple OJS cells

::: {.absolute left=129px top=355px width=1050px height=52px}
```{ojs}
1 + 1
```
:::

```{ojs}
2 + 2
```

## Slide 3 - OJS alongside plain code block

```python
not_executed = True
```

::: {.absolute left=14px top=455px width=1050px height=52px}
```{ojs}
"observable runs"
```
:::
